invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.099（基于ATR 0.0019和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.099 (based on ATR 0.0019 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破88.0（基于ATR 1.7003和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 88.0 (based on ATR 1.7003 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破75000.0（基于ATR 785.7888和阻力位）或融资费率转负超过-0.01%（多头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 75000.0 (based on ATR 785.7888 and resistance) or funding rate turns negative below -0.01% (long covering ends).
